scripts.test: node --import tsx scripts/with-default-postgres.ts npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:auth && npm run test:unit:db && npm run test:unit:ratelimit && npm run test:unit:runtime && npm run test:unit:next-routes && npm run test:unit:next-ui
scripts.db:gen: node --import tsx scripts/with-default-postgres.ts drizzle-kit generate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate: node --import tsx scripts/with-default-postgres.ts drizzle-kit migrate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.test:unit:auth: node --import tsx scripts/with-default-postgres.ts node --import tsx --test src/infrastructure/auth/*.test.ts
scripts.test:unit:db: node --import tsx scripts/with-default-postgres.ts node --import tsx --test src/infrastructure/db/*.test.ts
scripts.test:unit:ratelimit: node --import tsx scripts/with-default-postgres.ts node --import tsx --test src/infrastructure/ratelimit/*.test.ts
scripts.test:unit:next-routes: node --import tsx scripts/with-default-postgres.ts sh -lc "node --import tsx --test app/api/auth/route.test.ts app/api/avatar/route.test.ts app/api/me/route.test.ts app/api/teams/route.test.ts app/api/teams/*/route.test.ts app/api/booking/route.test.ts app/api/teams/availability.route.test.ts && node --import tsx ./app/api/teams/\[shareId\]/integrations/webhooks/route.test.ts"
